title: Broad Phase, Circle, Rect, Mask, Seam, and Swept Collision Detection
description: The game tests every pair, uses transformed Rect overlap as exact geometry, constructs masks every frame, misses seam pairs, and lets fast bullets tunnel through small rocks. Learners cumulatively produce layered collision detection pipeline through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Choose circle, AABB, rotated bound, polygon, or mask from acceptable false positives, cost, and player expectation.
Use groups, spatial partitioning, sweep, or bounded pair sets to reduce candidates without dropping possible overlaps.
Compare squared center distance with squared radius sum and test tangent, overlap, separation, zero radius, and float tolerance.
